description: A course promotion card displaying a course title, award, level, metadata (dates, duration, attendance), and a short description with an arrow link indicator.

stories.name: Default
stories.description: Postgraduate taught course card with coursemeta list

props.title: Health Economics and Decision Modelling
props.description: Develop analytical skills for a career in health economics. Learn to measure, model, and evaluate healthcare interventions to inform public health decisions.

stories.name: Accredited
stories.description: Postgraduate taught course card with accreditation badge

props.title: Architecture
props.description: This course will enable you to make sophisticated architectural propositions. You will discover the benefits of socially engaged design through research-led design studios and our acclaimed live projects programme.

stories.name: MultipleDurations
stories.description: Course card with multiple study durations and attendance modes

props.title: Clinical Research
props.description: Our Clinical Research course prepares students with the skills to critically evaluate research and handle the practical and regulatory challenges of designing and conducting clinical and health research projects.

stories.name: Undergraduate
stories.description: Undergraduate course card with ugcoursecard variant and details block

props.title: Nursing (Adult)
props.description: Become an adult nurse and make a difference every day. Equip yourself with the clinical skills, knowledge and confidence you need to register with the Nursing and Midwifery Council (NMC) and deliver exceptional care to patients.

stories.name: Group
stories.description: Multiple course cards as typically rendered in a listing

instances.title: Urban Design and Planning
instances.description: Gain specialist skills and understanding of urban design and planning, engage with critical challenges facing cities internationally.

instances.title: Health Economics and Decision Modelling
instances.description: Develop analytical skills for a career in health economics.

instances.title: Architecture
instances.description: This course will enable you to make sophisticated architectural propositions.

notes: Two structural variants exist: the standard postgraduate variant uses a .coursecard__heading wrapper with a .coursemeta ul, while the undergraduate variant (.ugcoursecard) places .level above h3 and uses a .details div instead of .coursemeta ul. The link-arrow / ccarrow section with a Font Awesome arrow icon is always present and hardcoded. The isAccredited prop controls whether an 'Accredited' li item appears in the coursemeta list. Font Awesome classes (fas, fa-*) are used for icons and should be hardcoded per their role.
